scripts.dev: concurrently --names "api,web" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "cross-env PORT=8082 pnpm --filter @workspace/backend run dev" "cross-env PORT=5000 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:frontend: cross-env PORT=5000 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/frontend run dev
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.heroku-postbuild: pnpm --filter @workspace/frontend run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/backend run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./backend" --filter "./frontend" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
